title: PLAYGROUP - 211info
text: YACHATS YOUTH AND FAMILY ACTIVITIES PROGRAM PLAYGROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for children and their caregivers to take advantage of educational and stimulating activity stations and play together. 441 Highway 101 N Yachats, OR 97498 Eligibility: Children ages 0-5 and their parents Hours: One time per week September-May, times vary Email (541) 547-4599 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 547-4599 Main phone Main phone (541) 547-4599 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call to confirm date and time. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Yachats SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Classrooms and kitchen are located on main floor of Commons. After school and program offices are in room 2. Preschool is in room 4. Services: Children's Play Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AFTER SCHOOL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
